positive: Minimalist geometric arrangement of abstract bioluminescent deep-sea flora and crystalline fauna. The main subject features intersecting lines, sharp silhouettes, and organic yet structured shapes that evoke a cosmic, liquid geometry. Color palette: deep indigo, vibrant cyan, neon magenta, and brilliant turquoise against a stark midnight black background. Lighting: High contrast, subsurface scattering for the glowing elements, giving a futuristic, ethereal look. Composition: Centrally focused and symmetrical, suitable for repeating pattern or apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Abstract Biopunk, highly detailed, vector-like crispness.
negative: blurry, sketch, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, artifacts, jpeg artifacts
